name: Gaahk
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of mushroom soup (institutional size)
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the cans using a can opener if not of Klingon blood.
2. Place a 10 x 14-inch lasagne pan on the stovetop.
3. Cover the bottom of the pan with 2 cans of Chinese noodles.
4. Mix milk with the cream of mushroom soup in a separate bowl.
5. Pour half of the soup mixture over the noodles.
6. Drain the tuna and flake it over the soup mixture.
7. Cover the tuna with the remaining soup mixture.
8. Cover the soup mixture with the remaining 2 cans of Chinese noodles.
9. Press lightly to ensure everything is covered.
10. Bake at 350°F for approximately 45 minutes, or until it bubbles.
11. Let set then serve.
